failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and produced an incorrect negative answer even though the tool returned one matching Jigsaw Puzzle: item_id 1096508426 priced at $46.13.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and clearly returned count=1 with item_id 1096508426, available=true, difficulty level=beginner, product_type implied by query, and price=46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the bad answer despite acknowledging there was at least one matching item.
